name: hero_bg_type
label: Hero Background Type
help_text: Choose a solid color or an uploaded image for the hero.

name: hero_overlay_opacity
label: Image Overlay Darkness (%)
help_text: Darkens the image so white text stays readable.

name: hero_headline
label: Hero Headline
help_text: Use the word Agenda to highlight it in green.

name: hero_subtext
label: Hero Subtext
default: Three days of sessions, networking, and hands-on learning in Austin, Texas.

name: default_day
label: Default Day Tab
help_text: Which day tab is selected when the page loads.

name: cta_headline
label: CTA Headline
default: Join us in Austin this October

name: cta_subtext
label: CTA Subtext
default: Three days of sessions, networking, and hands-on learning. Limited seats available.

name: days
label: Agenda Days
help_text: Day tabs and headers only. Schedule rows are edited in Schedule Items below.

children.name: day_key

children.help_text: Must match the Day on schedule items.

children.name: header_sub

children.help_text: Optional pill next to the day header.
